misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Daniel, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his competitive spirit and, at times, visible frustration on the course, although he always remains a gentleman. Representing Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry, Daniel has graced the tournament with his presence on 7 prior occasions and secured the coveted Hector Trophée twice. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him so far, Daniel's determination is admired by his peers.

While Daniel is not currently slated to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his fans know that the situation could change at any moment. His continued presence in the golfing world ensures that his name remains one to watch, and his past performances serve as a testament to his enduring passion for the game.
